description: Mixed Designs: Includes one towel with vibrant strawberries, one solid sage green waffle weave, and one striped green & white, all designed to complement each other Durable Cotton Fabric: Made from high-quality cotton that offers excellent absorbency and stands up to daily kitchen use Functional & Decorative: Perfect for drying dishes, wiping counters, or adding a touch of farmhouse charm to your kitchen Size: 65 x 45 cm Material: Cotton Brighten up your kitchen with this delightful Set of 3 Strawberry and Green Kitchen Tea Towels. Each towel features a distinct design - vibrant strawberry and floral print, classic sage green waffle weave, and a neutral striped pattern - offering a blend of practicality and charm. Crafted from a soft, absorbent cotton, these towels are ideal for everyday kitchen tasks like drying dishes or cleaning up spills. They also serve as stylish accents when draped over oven handles or counters. Durable, easy to care for, and visually appealing, this tea towel set brings fresh, botanical warmth to any kitchen space.
